blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 6,219 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 29".
